description_long: This house features a simple, boxy structure with a flat roof and a prominent overhanging awning at the front. The main entryway consists of double doors that open outward, flanked by a set of vertical windows on one side. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light color, with minimal decorative elements, giving it a modern utilitarian appearance. The front facade includes a paved area that could serve as a small porch or walkway. There are a few small, rectangular windows and a single door on the side and rear, providing basic natural light and access. The interior appears open and unfurnished, with visible wall openings and a high ceiling.
description: A modern, boxy single-story house with a flat roof, double front doors, and minimalistic exterior details.
description_view_0: Front view showing double entry doors, a large overhanging awning, and a set of vertical windows to the left.
description_view_1: Side-rear view with plain walls, a small window, and the awning extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a single door and a small window, with minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a blank wall and the edge of the awning and paved area.
attribute_entryway_design: Double outward-opening doors under a wide flat awning, with a paved entry area and minimal ornamentation.
